Lesson 4 - 1. Act as ONE
2. Safeguard our Environment, Safety and Quality

Chapter 2

Code of Conduct

2. Safeguard our Environment, Safety and Quality

Our People, Planet and Partner

Our success is built on more than just operational efficiency; it is rooted in a steadfast commitment to our people, our planet, and our partner. By adhering to these standards, we strive not only to meet legal requirements but also to set the benchmark for excellence in the global maritime industry.

Click on each tab to see our commitment:

PURSUIT OF SAFETY
SAFEGUARDING OUR ENVIRONMENT
IMPROVEMENT OF SERVICE QUALITY

We ensure safety in all its operations.

We comply with all applicable health and safety laws and regulations in the regions where we operate.

We contribute to ongoing improvements in transport safety technologies which can better improve ONE’s pursuit of safety, and to continuously engage in safety-related know-how development.

We protect the environment and ecosystems by taking action on climate change, preventing marine pollution and using resources responsibly.

KNOWLEDGE CHECK

Q.1 

Drag the Core Principle from the right column to its corresponding Organizational Goal on the left:

Reduce waste and proactively preserve natural ecological systems.
Selectable item

Chapter 2

Code of Conduct

2. Safeguard our Environment, Safety and Quality

Our People, Planet and Partner

Our success is built on more than just operational efficiency; it is rooted in a steadfast commitment to our people, our planet, and our partner. By adhering to these standards, we strive not only to meet legal requirements but also to set the benchmark for excellence in the global maritime industry.

Click on each tab to see our commitment:

PURSUIT OF SAFETY
SAFEGUARDING OUR ENVIRONMENT
IMPROVEMENT OF SERVICE QUALITY

We are committed to delivering and maintaining exceptional and reliable service quality to customers. We shall earn the trust and satisfaction of our customers through the continuous improvement of ONE’s service quality, know-how development, innovation, and the pursuit of cost efficiency.

We protect the environment and ecosystems by taking action on climate change, preventing marine pollution and using resources responsibly.
